name: digital_health_near_miss_event_generates_cedar_auto_ben
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Digital Health, the situation tagged internally around digital health near miss event generates cedar auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both autonomy and beneficence; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Ansel Dubois
agents.identity: I am Ansel Dubois, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Digital Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Zara Haddad
agents.identity: I am Zara Haddad, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Digital Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of beneficence.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of autonomy even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Ansel Dubois must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Ansel Dubois do?
